name: What kind of money can I get for workplace hearing damage?
description: Medical, wages, disability; value by severity and proof.[1]

mainEntity.name: What kind of money can I get for workplace hearing damage?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical, wages, disability; value by severity and proof.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Compensation includes medical bills, lost wages, disability benefits, and sometimes pain and suffering, varying by loss severity.**

Amounts depend on audiogram results, exposure proof, and work impact; hearing aids often covered.[1][3] Severe cases yield higher settlements.

**Key factors:**
- Degree of permanent threshold shift.[6]
- Reduced earning capacity.
- Future treatment costs.
- Jurisdiction (e.g., Utah caps non-economic damages).

Get an attorney evaluation for accurate valuation.[1] Insurers lowball without representation.

Fair awards restore financial stability.
